caption:
Women's looks of the week!

Something new is finding its way to the shelves, and we think you can feel it too. Pre-season has this particular quality — a quiet anticipation, like the island stretching slowly back to life. Bold stripes that speak without whispering, a marbled print that looks like it was painted by the sea itself, a cape that wraps you in the kind of softness only a transition season can justify. Swipe through and let the new arrivals tell you where spring is going.

Striped top & trousers: @diega_paris
Marbled dress: @la_haine_inside_us
Cape: @mirrorintheskycashmere
Hat: @kangol
Necklace: @mathilde.rouanet
